data.title: Germany’s production falls to its lowest since pandemic 2020
data.description:
Germany’s industrial output dropped in June to its lowest level since 2020, the year when the coronavirus pandemic swept the planet, paralyzing the global economy. The decline in German production, which comes amid weak demand and slow growth abroad, coincided with a continued decrease in industrial orders. The trend sets in as the country’s export-oriented […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/germany-production-falls-since-pandemic-2020/

data.title: Франция запускает майнинг биткоина на ядерной энергии
data.description:
Франция переходит на новый этап внедрения криптовалют, поскольку партия крайнего правого крыла Rassemblement National (RN) готовит законопроект, разрешающий использовать неиспользуемую ядерную энергию для майнинга Биткоина. По информации французской газеты Le Monde, лидер партии и трижды выдвигавшийся в президенты Марин Ле Пен продвигала этот план во время визита на АЭС Фламанвиль 11 марта, заявив, что это разумный способ превратить упущенное электричество в “надежные и крайне прибыльные” цифровые активы. План Франции: майнить Биткоин с помощью ядерной энергии Предложение Rassemblement National стало одной из самых обсуждаемых криптоинициатив во Франции. Партия утверждает, что поскольку Франция часто производит больше электроэнергии, чем потребляет, излишки не должны пропадать впустую
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/franciya-zapuskaet-majning-bitkoina-na-yadernoj-energii/

data.title: Ripple Makes $200M Strategic Move Aiming to Dominate Stablecoin Finance: Is This Bullish for XRP?
data.description:
Ripple has just made a substantial strategic investment of $200 million, positioning itself to take a leading role in the rapidly evolving stablecoin finance sector. This bold initiative raises questions about the potential implications for its native cryptocurrency, XRP, and whether this move might signal a bullish trend for its value in the cryptocurrency market. Financial analysts and investors are now closely examining how Ripple's actions could influence the broader landscape of digital currencies and what it means for the future of XRP.
source: https://blocknews.com/ripple-makes-200m-strategic-move-aiming-to-dominate-stablecoin-finance-is-this-bullish-for-xrp/

data.title: Maestro’s Report Details Bitcoin’s Evolution From Store of Value to an On-Chain Finance Hub
data.description:
After more than a decade and a half of its market debut, a new industry report from Austin-based Bitcoin infrastructure firm Maestro is painting an interesting picture, one where Bitcoin has moved beyond its traditional role (of an SoV) to become the backbone of a growing on-chain finance ecosystem (dubbed “BitcoinFi”) worth billions of dollars. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/maestros-report-details-bitcoins-evolution-from-store-of-value-to-an-on-chain-finance-hub/

data.title: New York Regulator Secures $48.5M Settlement From Paxos Over Binance Dealings
data.description:
Paxos Trust Company has agreed to a $48. 5 million settlement with New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) over allegations it failed to monitor illicit activity linked to its former partner, cryptocurrency exchange Binance.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/new-york-regulator-secures-48-5m-settlement-from-paxos-over-binance-dealings/

data.title: Bank of America Economists Rule Out Rate Cut in 2025, According to the Trillion-Dollar Lender’s CEO Brian Moynihan – Here’s Why
data.description:
Bank of America’s economists are predicting that the Fed will not cut rates this year, according to the lender’s CEO Brian Moynihan. In a new CNBC interview, Moynihan says that the bank’s economists believe inflation pressures will cause the Fed to hold off cutting rates until 2026 as the economy remains healthy.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/08/07/bank-of-america-economists-rule-out-rate-cut-in-2025-according-to-the-trillion-dollar-lenders-ceo-brian-moynihan-heres-why/

data.title: OpenAI Launches Enhanced GPT-5 Model for Programming and Writing
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI has unveiled its latest GPT-5 model, designed to improve capabilities in programming and writing. The release marks a significant step in AI development, providing users with more powerful tools for various applications.
